title: Tinker Bell and the Great Fairy Rescue
cast: Mae Whitman, Lauren Mote, Michael Sheen, Pamela Adlon, Lucy Liu
description: During a summer stay on the mainland, Tinker Bell is accidentally discovered while investigating a little girl's fairy house. As the other fairies, led by the brash Vidia, launch a daring rescue in the middle of a fierce storm, Tink develops a special bond with the lonely, little girl.

title: My Name Is Khan
cast: Shah Rukh Khan, Kajol, Arjan Aujla, Jimmy Shergill, Sonya Jehan
country: China, India, United Arab Emirates, United States of America
description: Rizwan Khan, a Muslim from the Borivali section of Mumbai, has Asperger's syndrome. He marries a Hindu single mother, Mandira, in San Francisco. After 9/11, Rizwan is detained by authorities at LAX who treat him as a terrorist because of his condition and his race.

title: The Way Back
cast: Ed Harris, Jim Sturgess, Saoirse Ronan, Colin Farrell, Mark Strong
country: India, United Arab Emirates, United Kingdom, United States of America
description: At the dawn of WWII, several men escape from a Russian gulag—to take a perilous and uncertain journey to freedom as they cross deserts, mountains and several nations.

title: Alpha and Omega
cast: Justin Long, Hayden Panettiere, Dennis Hopper, Danny Glover, Larry Miller
description: Two young wolves at opposite ends of their pack's social order are thrown together into a foreign land and need each other to return home, but love complicates everything.

title: Enthiran
cast: Rajinikanth, Aishwarya Rai Bachchan, Danny Denzongpa, Santhanam, Karunas
description: Dr. Vaseegaran creates Chitti, a powerful robot in his own image, but it is rejected by the scientific body AIRD due to its lack of human behaviour and emotions. After a lightning strike triggers emotions in Chitti, he begins to develop human-like feelings. However, Chitti falls in love with Dr. Vaseegaran's fiancée, Sana, and turns against his creator, leading to dangerous consequences.

title: The Warrior's Way
cast: Jang Dong-gun, Kate Bosworth, Geoffrey Rush, Danny Huston, Ti Lung
country: India, New Zealand, South Korea, United States of America
description: A warrior-assassin is forced to hide in a small town in the American Badlands after refusing a mission.

title: Kites
cast: Hrithik Roshan, Bárbara Mori, Kabir Bedi, Kangana Ranaut, Nicholas Brown
description: A wounded man searches for his sweetheart in the Mexican desert while on the run from the police, bounty hunters, and others.

title: Karthik Calling Karthik
cast: Farhan Akhtar, Deepika Padukone, Ram Kapoor, Vivan Bhatena, Vipin Sharma
description: A much abused loner achieves success, and even wins the heart of his gorgeous co-worker, after getting early morning mysterious phone calls from someone.

title: The Tempest
cast: Helen Mirren, Felicity Jones, Reeve Carney, David Strathairn, Tom Conti
country: India, United Kingdom, United States of America
description: An adaptation of the play by William Shakespeare. Prospera (a female version of Shakespeare's Prospero) is the usurped ruler of Milan who has been banished to a mysterious island with her daughter. Using her magical powers, she draws her enemies to the island to exact her revenge.

title: Dabangg
cast: Salman Khan, Sonakshi Sinha, Arbaaz Khan, Sonu Sood, Vinod Khanna
description: A troubled relationship with his younger half-brother and stepfather compels Chulbul Pandey to become a corrupt but fearless cop whose life changes when he locks horns with a corrupt political leader.

title: Housefull
cast: Akshay Kumar, Arjun Rampal, Ritesh Deshmukh, Deepika Padukone, Lara Dutta
description: Believing himself to be a jinx and bringing bad luck upon himself and others, a man attempts to find true love, but ends up in very complicated relationships.

title: Udaan
cast: Ronit Roy, Rajat Barmecha, Aayan Boradia, Ram Kapoor, Manjot Singh
description: Upon returning to his industrial hometown, a young man must decide whether to follow his own dreams or acquiesce to his father's plans for his future.

title: Raavanan
cast: Vikram, Aishwarya Rai Bachchan, Prithviraj Sukumaran, Karthik Muthuraman, Prabhu
description: After inspector Dev stirs the reign of Veeraiya, a tribal outlaw, the latter responds by kidnapping his wife, Ragini. While she tries to escape from him, Dev fights many resistances to find her.

title: Darling
cast: Prabhas, Kajal Agarwal, Prabhu, Tulasi, Ahuti Prasad
description: Prabha prepares to meet Nandini, his childhood friend, at a reunion party organised by his father. However, things take a turn when Nisha, a gangster's daughter, falls in love with him.

title: Band Baaja Baaraat
cast: Ranveer Singh, Anushka Sharma, Manmeet Singh, Manu Rishi Chadha, Manish Chaudhary
description: Shruti and Bittoo decide to start a wedding planning company together after they graduate from university, but romance gets in the way of business.

title: Raajneeti
cast: Ajay Devgn, Ranbir Kapoor, Manoj Bajpayee, Katrina Kaif, Arjun Rampal
description: It is the story of a fiercely fought election campaign, where money power and corruption are the accepted norms, and where treachery and manipulation are routinely used weapons. As the personal drama of these conflict-ridden characters unfolds against this gritty backdrop, love and friendship become mere baits, and relationships get sacrificed at the altar of political alignments. The darkness that rises from their souls threatens to envelope all that they hold precious. Until eventually, in the crescendo of increasing violence, the line between good and evil blurs, making it impossible to distinguish heroes from villains. Raajneeti is the story of Indian democracy. And its ugly underside. It is about politics. And beyond.

title: Once Upon a Time in Mumbaai
cast: Ajay Devgn, Emraan Hashmi, Kangana Ranaut, Prachi Desai, Randeep Hooda
description: A tale of two gangsters from the eras of past and present, whose lives enter parallel paths as they struggle to survive within Bombay's criminal underworld.

title: Tees Maar Khan
cast: Akshay Kumar, Katrina Kaif, Akshaye Khanna, Ali Asgar, Vijay Maurya
description: A con artist poses as a film director in a village with the intention of executing a caper with the unwitting help of the villagers.

title: Gandu
cast: Anubrata Basu, Rii Sen, Kamalika Banerjee, Silajit Majumder, Joyraj Bhattacharya
description: After Nihilistic rapper Gandu steals from his mother's lover, he embarks on a drug-fueled rampage with a rickshaw puller.

title: Guzaarish
cast: Hrithik Roshan, Aishwarya Rai Bachchan, Shernaz Patel, Aditya Roy Kapur, Suhel Seth
description: Ethan, a magician rendered paralyzed in an accident, sets off a furor when he makes a petition to the court to end his own life.

title: Singam
cast: Suriya, Anushka Shetty, Prakash Raj, Nassar, Vivek
description: The story, set in the backdrop of Nallore, a small town in Thoothukudi District, revolves around Sub-Inspector Durai Singam, a brave and just policeman who serves in his hometown primarily to fulfill his father’s wish. Durai Singam settles every dispute in his town patiently with his words of wisdom and resorts to force only when the situation demands it. Kavya, a city girl who comes on vacation to Nallore, falls in love with Durai Singam. Erimalai, Durai Singam's bumbling colleague and friend, often accompanies him.

title: Anjaana Anjaani
cast: Priyanka Chopra Jonas, Ranbir Kapoor, Zayed Khan, Vishal Malhotra, Joy Sengupta
description: Akash and Kiara are trying to find luck in their life after several failed attempts to be successful in their careers and in love. Fed up, they both decide to commit suicide by jumping off a bridge. However, both land up on the same bridge at the same time.

title: Aayirathil Oruvan
cast: Karthi, R. Parthiban, Reema Sen, Andrea Jeremiah, Prathap Pothan
description: Anitha, a government official, embarks on a journey to find Chandramouli, an archaeologist, who went to Vietnam to search for any existence of the prince of the Chola dynasty.

title: Miral
cast: Freida Pinto, Hiam Abbass, Willem Dafoe, Vanessa Redgrave, Uri Gavriel
country: France, India, Israel, Italy, United States of America
description: A drama centered on an orphaned Palestinian girl growing up in the wake of the first Arab-Israeli war who finds herself drawn into the conflict.

title: Action Replayy
cast: Akshay Kumar, Aishwarya Rai Bachchan, Aditya Roy Kapur, Neha Dhupia, Randhir Kapoor
description: A young man tries to revive his parents' wilting marriage by traveling to the 1970s when their romance was budding to help make it bloom: something more complex than he expects.

title: Dhobi Ghat
cast: Prateik Babbar, Monica Dogra, Kriti Malhotra, Aamir Khan, Danish Husain
description: Arun is a reclusive and lonely modern art painter. Shai is an American banker who is on a visit to Mumbai. Munna is a washerboy also living near Arun and Yasmin. The movie is about these four characters from different class of society and how the lives of four characters are intertwined.

title: Vinnaithaandi Varuvaayaa
cast: Silambarasan, Trisha Krishnan, VTV Ganesh, Babu Antony, Lakshmi Ramakrishnan
description: A young, aspiring filmmaker falls in love with a girl who moves into the house above his, but her sophisticated nature does more harm than good to him.

title: Ye Maaya Chesave
cast: Naga Chaitanya Akkineni, Samantha Ruth Prabhu, Krishnudu, Sapan Saran, Sanjay Swaroop
description: An aspiring Hindu director falls in love with a Christian girl whose parents disapprove of their impending relationship.

title: Dulha Mil Gaya
cast: Sushmita Sen, Fardeen Khan, Shah Rukh Khan, Ishita Sharma, Johnny Lever
description: A man, the heir to an empire, believes that marriage will ruin a man's life. Unfortunately, the only way for him to inherit his father's wealth, is to get married.

title: Khatta Meetha
cast: Akshay Kumar, Trisha Krishnan, Rajpal Yadav, Johnny Lever, Makrand Deshpande
description: The story follows Sachin Tichkule, a struggling contractor whose failure in making peace with the corrupt bureaucracy in town as well as strained relation with his ex-girlfriend and his family leads to misadventures that deprive him of his closest relations. However, as he begins to mend his ways, justice comes knocking on his door.

title: Golmaal 3
cast: Ajay Devgn, Arshad Warsi, Shreyas Talpade, Tusshar Kapoor, Kunal Khemu
description: Golmaal 3 highlights the story of hatred between two bunch of siblings within a family. The family that eats together prays together, lives together, and can't stand each other.

title: Veer
cast: Salman Khan, Mithun Chakraborty, Jackie Shroff, Sohail Khan, Raj Khatri
description: A Pindari Prince goes to England to study military tactics so that he can avenge his people, but while there, he falls in love.

title: Nagavalli
cast: Venkatesh, Richa Gangopadhyay, Anushka Shetty, Poonam Kaur, Kamalinee Mukherjee
description: After a family member receives a Nagavalli/Chandramukhi's portrait as a prize in the Nagavalli Dance competition, various characters start having abnormal experiences. In order to save themselves and unfold the mystery, the family looks to Ramachandra Acharya and Dr. Vijay.

title: I Hate Luv Storys
cast: Imran Khan, Sonam Kapoor Ahuja, Sammir Dattani, Samir Soni, Bruna Abdullah
description: Simran loves love stories, with her ideal job and perfect boyfriend, she lives a blissful and dreamy life. However, things are rudely interrupted by Jay's cynicism on sentimentality.

title: Pyaar Impossible!
cast: Priyanka Chopra Jonas, Uday Chopra, Advika Yadav, Anupam Kher, Dino Morea
description: Be-spectacled geek, Abhay falls in love with college hottie, Alisha and silently slinks away into the shadows when he realises she's unattainable. Seven years later, he re-enters her life as the nanny and hopes to woo the single mom, this time at least. Does he succeed?

title: Lafangey Parindey
cast: Neil Nitin Mukesh, Deepika Padukone, Kay Kay Menon, Piyush Mishra, Namit Das
description: The path of a street fighter and a dancer on skates, who are in love, is paved by friendship, grit and hope.

title: Tere Bin Laden
cast: Ali Zafar, Pradhuman Singh, Sugandha Garg, Nikhil Ratnaparkhi, Piyush Mishra
description: Ali Hassan (Ali Zafar), a reporter with a downmarket TV channel in Karachi, is keen to go to USA for a better life, but his visa has been refused six times in seven years. In desperation, he gets hold of an Osama Bin Laden look alike and makes a fake Osama tape which he sells to the owner of his channel to raise money for a false identity, a new passport and better luck with US visa. As one can expect, it is far from smooth sailing for him and his friends, as they get into a series of comic situations.

title: Real Steel
cast: Hugh Jackman, Dakota Goyo, Evangeline Lilly, Kevin Durand, Anthony Mackie
description: Charlie Kenton is a washed-up fighter who retired from the ring when robots took over the sport. After his robot is trashed, he reluctantly teams up with his estranged son to rebuild and train an unlikely contender.

title: I Am Number Four
cast: Alex Pettyfer, Dianna Agron, Teresa Palmer, Timothy Olyphant, Kevin Durand
description: A teenage fugitive with an incredible secret races to stay one step ahead of the mysterious forces seeking destroy him in this sci-fi action thriller. With three dead and one on the run, the race to find the elusive Number Four begins. Outwardly normal teen John Smith never gets too comfortable in the same identity, and along with his guardian, Henri, he is constantly moving from town to town. With each passing day, John gains a stronger grasp on his extraordinary new powers, and his bond to the beings that share his fantastic fate grows stronger.

title: Cowboys & Aliens
cast: Daniel Craig, Harrison Ford, Olivia Wilde, Sam Rockwell, Adam Beach
description: A stranger stumbles into the desert town of Absolution with no memory of his past and a futuristic shackle around his wrist. With the help of mysterious beauty Ella and the iron-fisted Colonel Dolarhyde, he finds himself leading an unlikely posse of cowboys, outlaws, and Apache warriors against a common enemy from beyond this world in an epic showdown for survival.

title: War Horse
cast: Jeremy Irvine, Peter Mullan, Emily Watson, Niels Arestrup, David Thewlis
description: On the brink of the First World War, Albert's beloved horse Joey is sold to the Cavalry by his father. Against the backdrop of the Great War, Joey begins an odyssey full of danger, joy, and sorrow, and he transforms everyone he meets along the way. Meanwhile, Albert, unable to forget his equine friend, searches the battlefields of France to find Joey and bring him home.

title: Pixie Hollow Games
cast: Megan Hilty, Brenda Song, Jason Dolley, Tiffany Thornton, Zendaya
description: Rosetta and new arrival Chloe band together to try to break the garden fairies' legendary losing streak in the Pixie Hollow Games, a sports spectacle filled with pixie pageantry, fantastic fairy events and hilarious surprises.

title: Fright Night
cast: Anton Yelchin, Colin Farrell, Toni Collette, David Tennant, Imogen Poots
description: A teenager suspects his new neighbour is a vampire. Unable to convince anyone, he tries to enlist the help of a self-proclaimed vampire hunter and magician.

title: Zindagi Na Milegi Dobara
cast: Hrithik Roshan, Abhay Deol, Farhan Akhtar, Katrina Kaif, Kalki Koechlin
description: Three friends who were inseparable in childhood decide to go on a three-week-long bachelor road trip to Spain, in order to re-establish their bond and explore thrilling adventures, before one of them gets married. What will they learn of themselves and each other during the adventure?

title: Rockstar
cast: Ranbir Kapoor, Nargis Fakhri, Shammi Kapoor, Aditi Rao Hydari, Kumud Mishra
description: College student Janardhan is a simpleton who desperately seeks inspiration for the musician inside him. Although heartbreak helps him reach his goal, it also leads him to self-destruction.

title: Ra.One
cast: Shah Rukh Khan, Arjun Rampal, Kareena Kapoor Khan, Armaan Verma, Tom Wu
description: When the titular antagonist of an action game takes on physical form, it's up to the game's less powerful protagonist to save the world.

title: Don 2
cast: Shah Rukh Khan, Priyanka Chopra Jonas, Boman Irani, Kunal Kapoor, Lara Dutta
description: Having conquered the Asian underworld, crime boss Don sets in motion a plan that will give him dominion over Europe.

title: Siruthai
cast: Karthi, Tamannaah Bhatia, Santhanam, Bhumika Chawla, Manobala
description: A thief comes across a little girl who says that he's her father. When he learns the truth about his lookalike, who's an honest cop, he decides to turn a new leaf and help get rid of the local baddie.

title: Singham
cast: Ajay Devgn, Kajal Agarwal, Prakash Raj, Sachin Khedekar, Ashok Saraf
description: An honest, small town cop is transferred to a big city that is controlled by a crime boss that he had once humiliated.

title: Desi Boyz
cast: Akshay Kumar, John Abraham, Deepika Padukone, Chitrangda Singh, Anupam Kher
description: When two cash-strapped UK-based Indians become male escorts amid an economic downturn, money flows right in but everything else in their lives starts falling apart.

title: Bodyguard
cast: Salman Khan, Kareena Kapoor Khan, Hazel Keech, Raj Babbar, Mahesh Manjrekar
description: Lovely Singh is extremely respectful of Mr Rana and his daughter Divya. While appointed as Divya's bodyguard, he falls in love with a girl he has never met, unaware that she is none other than Divya.

title: Rajanna
cast: Annie, Nagarjuna Akkineni, Sneha, Nassar, Shweta Menon
description: The film is set in the Nelakondapalli village of khammam district in Nizam Princely State of Hyderabad of the late 1940s. The feudal society is under the vice-like grip of an aristocratic family and its head, a Dorasani (Shwetha Menon). Mallamma (Baby Annie) is the darling of the village, who is living in perpetual humiliation. They seek solace in her songs. Brought up by Sambayya, an old man, she develops a mysterious attachment to a basil tree which is regarded as holy by the entire village.

title: Deiva Thirumagal
cast: Vikram, Sara Arjun, Anushka Shetty, Nassar, Amala Paul
description: An intellectually disabled man fights for custody of his 7-year-old daughter, and in the process teaches his opponent lawyer the value of love and family.

title: Kanchana
cast: Raghava Lawrence, R. Sarathkumar, Kovai Sarala, Devadarshini, Sriman
description: Raghava (Lawrence) is a happy go lucky guy who loves to play cricket but is a chicken at heart. The very mention of the word ghost gives him shivers so much that he sleeps with his mom (Kovai Sarala). He is also in love with Priya (Lakshmi Rai). However, an attempt to play a cricket match in an unused ground leads Raghava to get something dark to his home. The dark spirit begins to cause few weird things at home and one day it enters the body of Raghava which goes on killing few specific people. Who is that evil spirit? Why is it killing few people? Can Raghava get rid of the spirit? All this forms the rest of the story.

title: The Dirty Picture
cast: Vidya Balan, Emraan Hashmi, Tusshar Kapoor, Naseeruddin Shah, Anju Mahendru
description: After running away from home in search of movie stardom, a village girl rises to become a prominent sex symbol.

title: Delhi Belly
cast: Imran Khan, Kunaal Roy Kapur, Vir Das, Shenaz Treasury, Poorna Jagannathan
description: Three unsuspecting, average guys find themselves on the hit list of one of India's most-powerful crime syndicates.

title: Mere Brother Ki Dulhan
cast: Ali Zafar, Imran Khan, Katrina Kaif, Tara D'Souza, Kyra Dutt
description: A Mumbai man finds himself in an unpredictable situation when the prospective bride of his older brother is a woman he has history with.

title: The Prodigies
cast: Jeffrey Evan Thomas, Jacob Rosenbaum, Dominic Gould, Moon Dailly, Isabelle Van Waes
country: Luxembourg, France, United Kingdom, India, Belgium, Canada
description: NYC, Central Park, 2010. Five young teenagers are violently assaulted. But they’re not your average teenagers… they’re prodigies. The trauma of the assault incites them to lash out against the world in a cold and calculating way. The five chillingly brilliant minds come together to concoct a perfect revenge. The only person aware of the pending doom is Jimbo Farrar, a sixth prodigy, who has gathered them. As long as he fights against his five counterparts with all his might, there’s hope for the world. But should he turn over to their side, it’s only a matter of time before a disaster of apocalyptic proportions ensues…

title: Mankatha
cast: Ajith Kumar, Arjun Sarja, Vaibhav, Ashwin Kakumanu, Premji Amaran
description: Vinayak, a suspended cop, helps a group of four men rob cricket betting money amounting to 500 crores INR. When it comes to splitting the amount, betrayal hits the team hard and a chase ensues.

title: Pyaar Ka Punchnama
cast: Kartik Aaryan, Raayo S. Bakhirta, Divyendu Sharma, Nushrratt Bharuccha, Sonnalli Seygall
description: Nishant starts dating Charu while his roommates Rajat and Vikrant already have girlfriends in Neha and Rhea respectively. Trouble starts when the guys feel that their girlfriends are dominating them.

title: No One Killed Jessica
cast: Rani Mukerji, Vidya Balan, Myra Karn, Neil Bhoopalam, Mohammed Zeeshan Ayyub
description: The true story of model Jessica Lall who was shot dead in a restaurant and the campaign to bring her killer to justice.

title: Urumi
cast: Prithviraj Sukumaran, Prabhu Deva, Genelia D'Souza, Vidya Balan, Nithya Menen
description: Kelu is a warrior in 16th century Kerala whose father was killed by Vasco da Gama and his troops. Kelu vows to avenge his father's death with the assistance of Vavvali and Ayesha, a warrior princess.

title: Ready
cast: Salman Khan, Asin Thottumkal, Paresh Rawal, Sudesh Lehri, Sharat Saxena
description: Prem believes Sanjana is the girl chosen by his dad and falls in love with her. However, she is a runaway bride escaping from a marriage set up by her mafia uncles against her wishes. On learning the truth, he devises a plan to win her over from her uncles who intend to usurp her huge inheritance.

title: Dookudu
cast: Mahesh Babu, Samantha Ruth Prabhu, Sonu Sood, Prakash Raj, Brahmanandam
description: A young policeman hunts down the men who caused the accident that put his politician father into a coma.

title: Game
cast: Abhishek Bachchan, Kangana Ranaut, Gauahar Khan, Sarah-Jane Dias, Jimmy Shergill
description: Four strangers are invited by the reclusive Kabir Malhotra, to his private island of Samos, Greece. They don't know each other and they don't know him ... and by the next morning they will wish they had never come.

title: Tanu Weds Manu
cast: R. Madhavan, Kangana Ranaut, Jimmy Shergill, Eijaz Khan, Deepak Dobriyal
description: Manu comes to India to find a bride for himself and falls for Tanu at first sight but she is a free spirited girl has no plans of marrying him.

title: Lilly the Witch: The Journey to Mandolan
cast: Alina Freund, Michael Mittermeier, Pilar Bardem, Cosma Shiva Hagen, Anja Kling
country: Austria, Belgium, France, Germany, India, Italy, Spain
description: Lilli is traveling to India, to solve a mystery.

title: Secret of the Wings
cast: Mae Whitman, Lucy Hale, Timothy Dalton, Jeff Bennett, Lucy Liu
description: Tinkerbell wanders into the forbidden Winter woods and meets Periwinkle. Together they learn the secret of their wings and try to unite the warm fairies and the winter fairies to help Pixie Hollow.

title: Life of Pi
cast: Suraj Sharma, Irrfan Khan, Ayush Tandon, Gautam Belur, Adil Hussain
country: India, Taiwan, United Kingdom, United States of America
description: The story of an Indian boy named Pi, a zookeeper's son who finds himself in the company of a hyena, zebra, orangutan, and a Bengal tiger after a shipwreck sets them adrift in the Pacific Ocean.

title: Total Recall
cast: Colin Farrell, Jessica Biel, Kate Beckinsale, Ethan Hawke, Bill Nighy
country: Canada, India, United States of America
description: Factory worker Doug Quaid takes a virtual mind-trip vacation with the Rekall company, opting for implanted memories of being a spy. When the procedure goes wrong, Quaid becomes a wanted man by the police and joins forces with a rebel fighter to stop the evil Chancellor Cohaagen.

title: Dredd
cast: Karl Urban, Olivia Thirlby, Lena Headey, Wood Harris, Langley Kirkwood
country: South Africa, United Kingdom, United States of America, India
description: In the future, America is a dystopian wasteland. The latest scourge is Ma-Ma, a prostitute-turned-drug pusher with a dangerous new drug and aims to take over the city. The only possibility of stopping her is an elite group of urban police called Judges, who combine the duties of judge, jury and executioner to deliver a brutal brand of swift justice. But even the top-ranking Judge, Dredd, discovers that taking down Ma-Ma isn’t as easy as it seems in this explosive adaptation of the hugely popular comic series.

title: Safe
cast: Jason Statham, Chris Sarandon, James Hong, Catherine Chan, Robert John Burke
description: After a former elite agent rescues a 12-year-old Chinese girl who's been abducted, they find themselves in the middle of a standoff between Triads, the Russian Mafia and high-level corrupt New York City politicians and police.

title: Lincoln
cast: Daniel Day-Lewis, Sally Field, David Strathairn, Joseph Gordon-Levitt, James Spader
description: The revealing story of the 16th US President's tumultuous final months in office. In a nation divided by war and the strong winds of change, Lincoln pursues a course of action designed to end the war, unite the country and abolish slavery. With the moral courage and fierce determination to succeed, his choices during this critical moment will change the fate of generations to come.

title: Paglu 2
cast: Dev, Koel Mallick, Rimjhim Mitra, Tota Roy Chowdhury, Rajatabha Dutta
description: Dev is a high school drop out from and a worthless village lad. He is hell bent on getting married. But the girl he wants to marry rejects him stating that he doesn't have college education. Dev, who is clever and street-smart decides to go to Kolkata for further education. While travelling in the train, he bashes up a bunch of rowdies teasing college girls. At the college in Kolkata, he meets Riya (and falls in love with her. A city gangster, Rudra,is in love with her and blackmails her to marry him. He beats anyone moving closely with Riya. Meanwhile, henchmen of the dreaded chieftain Dubai Keshto, from Dubai, are looking for Dev in the city.

title: Bullet to the Head
cast: Sylvester Stallone, Sung Kang, Sarah Shahi, Adewale Akinnuoye-Agbaje, Jason Momoa
country: India, Switzerland, United States of America
description: After watching their respective partners die, a cop and a hitman form an alliance in order to bring down their common enemy.

title: English Vinglish
cast: Sridevi, Adil Hussain, Mehdi Nebbou, Priya Anand, Navika Kotia
description: In the United States for the first time, an Indian housewife with a limited command of English turns Manhattan into her personal language school.

title: Gangs of Wasseypur - Part 1
cast: Manoj Bajpayee, Richa Chadha, Tigmanshu Dhulia, Nawazuddin Siddiqui, Reema Sen
description: In 1970s India, Sardar Khan vows to take revenge on the man who killed his father decades earlier.

title: Talaash
cast: Aamir Khan, Kareena Kapoor Khan, Rani Mukerji, Nawazuddin Siddiqui, Rajkummar Rao
description: A cop, investigating the mysterious death of a filmstar, meets a sex-worker, while he faces some personal problems psychologically. The mystery connects these people in a way, that ultimately changes their lives.

title: Student of the Year
cast: Sidharth Malhotra, Varun Dhawan, Alia Bhatt, Rishi Kapoor, Sana Saeed
description: Several alumni reminisce about their final year at St. Theresa's College and the events that shaped their lives.

title: Barfi!
cast: Ranbir Kapoor, Priyanka Chopra Jonas, Ileana D'Cruz, Saurabh Shukla, Jisshu Sengupta
description: The heartwarming tale of Barfi, a charming deaf-mute young man from 1970s Darjeeling, and two unalike women who can't help but fall for him.

title: Thattathin Marayathu
cast: Nivin Pauly, Isha Talwar, Aju Varghese, Sreenivasan, Manoj K Jayan
description: The film is about a Hindu Nair boy, Vinod, and a Muslim girl, Aisha, and the conflict arising out of this inter-faith relationship.

title: Thuppakki
cast: Vijay, Kajal Agarwal, Vidyut Jammwal, Sathyan Sivakumar, Jayaram
description: An army captain on holiday embarks on a mission to track down and destroy a terrorist gang and deactivate the sleeper cells under its command.

title: Eega
cast: Sudeep, Samantha Ruth Prabhu, Nani, Adithya Menon, Thagubothu Ramesh
description: Nani is a flower decorator, madly in love with his neighbor Bindhu. He gets killed by the baddie, Sudeep, a powerful businessman. Nani comes back as a housefly to get his revenge.

title: Rowdy Rathore
cast: Akshay Kumar, Sonakshi Sinha, Nassar, Yashpal Sharma, Mushtaq Khan
description: A small-time thug comes across a young girl who claims him to be her father, following which he realizes he has a lookalike who's being hunted by goons.

title: Jab Tak Hai Jaan
cast: Shah Rukh Khan, Katrina Kaif, Anushka Sharma, Sarika, Andrew Bicknell
description: A bomb disposal expert becomes bitter and lonely and is unable to fall in love until he is forced to deal with his past.

title: OMG: Oh My God!
cast: Paresh Rawal, Akshay Kumar, Mithun Chakraborty, Om Puri, Mahesh Manjrekar
description: A shopkeeper takes God to court when his shop is destroyed by an earthquake.

title: B.A. Pass
cast: Shadab Kamal, Shilpa Shukla, Dibyendu Bhattacharya, Shikha Joshi, Vijay Kaushik
description: After losing his parents in a car accident, Mukesh stays at his Aunt's house in Delhi. Enrolled in a good for nothing course in college he finds peace by playing chess at the local cemetery, the rest of the times he worries over ways to make a living and taking care of his sisters. 'B.A.Pass' is a story looking at the fatal promise of a new life. When Mukesh meets Sarika 'auntie' at a kitty party, little does he know of the city and it's ways and means to survive. Sarika seduces Mukesh, shy and inexperienced he falls for her. What follows is a twist of destiny, a kind of story that appears in the tabloids as 'heinous acts of crime'

title: Vicky Donor
cast: Ayushmann Khurrana, Yami Gautam, Annu Kapoor, Dolly Ahluwalia, Kamlesh Gill
description: A man is brought in by an infertility doctor to supply him with his sperm, where he becomes the biggest sperm donor for his clinic.

title: Ustad Hotel
cast: Dulquer Salmaan, Thilakan, Nithya Menen, Siddique, Mamukkoya
description: When his father refuses to support his choice of a career, an aspiring chef tries to fulfil his dream by helping his grandfather run his small eatery.

title: Ek Tha Tiger
cast: Salman Khan, Katrina Kaif, Girish Karnad, Ranvir Shorey, Gavie Chahal
description: An Indian agent is sent to observe the actions of a scientist but the mission becomes complicated when he falls in love with the scientist's Pakistani caretaker.

title: Housefull 2
cast: Akshay Kumar, John Abraham, Ritesh Deshmukh, Asin Thottumkal, Rishi Kapoor
description: A comedy of errors wherein four men help each other to fool their prospective father-in-laws creating a cascade of confusion and mayhem.

title: Agneepath
cast: Hrithik Roshan, Sanjay Dutt, Priyanka Chopra Jonas, Rishi Kapoor, Zarina Wahab
description: When his father is lynched by a mob after being framed by a gangster, a young boy leaves his village along with his pregnant mother  and flees to Mumbai. He takes up a life of crime and swears to avenge his father. A remake of the 1990 film.

title: Kahaani
cast: Vidya Balan, Parambrata Chatterjee, Nawazuddin Siddiqui, Saswata Chatterjee, Kharaj Mukherjee
description: Pregnant and alone in the city of Kolkata, a woman begins a relentless search for her missing husband, only to find that nothing is what it seems.

title: Ishaqzaade
cast: Arjun Kapoor, Parineeti Chopra, Gauahar Khan, Shashank Khaitan, Ratan Singh
description: While fighting for the political supremacy of their respective families, a Hindu man and a Muslim woman share a forbidden romance.

title: Ek Main Aur Ekk Tu
cast: Imran Khan, Kareena Kapoor Khan, Boman Irani, Rob Darren, Ratna Pathak Shah
description: Rahul and Riana meet each other for the first time, get drunk, and awake the next morning to find that they have gotten legally married to each other.

title: 1920: Evil Returns
cast: Aftab Shivdasani, Tia Bajpai, Vidya Malvade, Sharad Kelkar, Vicky Ahuja
description: This story revolves around a famous poet who meets a woman who is in trouble. In order to treat her, he takes her to Shimla in a big hospital, but soon that woman gets possessed by devil and goes out of control. Now the question remains that what is the relation that poet shares with her which compelled him to go to any extent to save her, why she was possessed by devil and who is the devil.

title: Cocktail
cast: Saif Ali Khan, Deepika Padukone, Diana Penty, Randeep Hooda, Boman Irani
description: A shy simple traditional girl leaves her family in India for her new husband in London, where she meets a shameless flirt and a complicated party girl.

title: Ship of Theseus
cast: Aida El Kashef, Sohum Shah, Neeraj Kabi, Vinay Shukla, Faraz Khan
description: Three stories about persons forced to think about the ethics and moral issues raised by medical advances.

title: Paan Singh Tomar
cast: Irrfan Khan, Mahie Gill, Vipin Sharma, Nawazuddin Siddiqui, Imran Hasnee
description: Paan Singh Tomar goes from celebrated runner to star brigand and rebel when life after sports fails to unfold as planned.

title: Dabangg 2
cast: Salman Khan, Sonakshi Sinha, Arbaaz Khan, Vinod Khanna, Prakash Raj
description: Chulbul Pandey invites a fresh trouble when he kills the brother of a notorious politician and the former swears to wreak havoc in his life.

title: The Swan Princess Christmas
cast: Yuri Lowenthal, Brian Nissen, Catherine Parks, David Lodge, Joseph Medrano
description: Princess Odette, Prince Derek and their trusted woodland friends reunite in this all-new adventure for their first Christmas celebration together! As the kingdom prepares for a festive holiday, the villainous Rothbart plots to destroy Christmas. Will the castle friends be able to stop Rothbart and save the day?  Told in beautiful CG animation for the very first time and featuring music by Anna Graceman from TV’s America’s Got Talent, The Swan Princess Christmas is an enchanting musical holiday treat the whole family will enjoy!

title: Gangs of Wasseypur - Part 2
cast: Nawazuddin Siddiqui, Huma Qureshi, Richa Chadha, Rajkummar Rao, Tigmanshu Dhulia
description: After the death of his father and brother Danish, Faizal Khan vows to take revenge by destroying Ramadhir Singh's gang.

title: Nanban
cast: Vijay, Jiiva, Srikanth, Ileana D'Cruz, Sathyaraj
description: The plot of the film illustrates the embankment of two friends on a quest for a lost buddy, who was once an optimistic and successful student. On their journey, they recount their college life and special moments that the three shared up until their lost friend secretly parted ways after convocation. During their quest, the two encounter a rival classmate who once made a long forgotten bet with them, a funeral that goes impossibly out of control, and a wedding they must crash.

cast: Dhanush, Shruti Haasan, Sivakarthikeyan, Prabhu, Sunder Ramu
description: Ram and Janani are high school sweethearts who eventually get married. However, Janani is mystified when Ram commits suicide all of a sudden and she tries to find out the truth behind his death.

title: Heroine
cast: Kareena Kapoor Khan, Arjun Rampal, Randeep Hooda, Lillete Dubey, Shahana Goswami
description: A female superstar struggles through the trials and tribulations of being a Bollywood actress.

title: Bol Bachchan
cast: Abhishek Bachchan, Ajay Devgn, Asin Thottumkal, Prachi Desai, Archana Puran Singh
description: Abbas Ali (Abhishek Bachchan) lives in Chandni Chowk, New Delhi with his sister Sania (Asin Thottumkal). They are legally fighting for an ancestral property— land case. But the odds turn against them and they lose. Their well wisher, Shastri Chacha, advises and convinces them to migrate to his village Ranakpur where he assures Abbas that he will get him a job at his owner's place. The owner being none other than the powerful Prithviraj Raghuvanshi (Ajay Devgn). Abbas enters Ranakpur village and while saving a child trapped inside a temple, he breaks open the lock of an ancestral temple but fate plays an important twist in Abbas' life as the whole village including Prithviraj's step-brother Vikrant opposes Abbas' actions but Prithviraj arrives and handles the situation.

title: Billa II
cast: Ajith Kumar, Vidyut Jammwal, Sudhanshu Pandey, Yog Jappie, Manoj K Jayan
description: Small-time diamond smuggler David befriends Goa-based gangster Abbasi. But when David begins to build inroads with an international gangster, Abbasi is not happy, and soon the two turn into bitter rivals.

title: Agent Vinod
cast: Saif Ali Khan, Kareena Kapoor Khan, Adil Hussain, Ravi Kishan, Prem Chopra
description: Agent Vinod sets out on a secret mission to find the reason behind the death of Rajan, his colleague. Terror strikes when he unfolds an even bigger conspiracy.

title: Arjun: The Warrior Prince
cast: Yuddvir Bakolia, Ila Arun, Aanjjan Srivastav, Sachin Khedekar, Vishnu Sharma
description: Legend knows him as an archer of unwavering focus, the soldier who fought a battle in his own heart before taking up arms against his enemy. This is the untold story of Arjun, hero of the Mahabharata. A precocious talent plunged from boyhood and innocence into a murky world of deceit and betrayal, coming of age to become the most powerful warrior of his time. From the dusty plains of Hastinapur to the icy peaks of the Himalayas, Arjun: The Warrior Prince is the story of a man discovering what it takes to be a hero.

title: Jism 2
cast: Sunny Leone, Randeep Hooda, Arunoday Singh, Arif Zakaria, Sumit Nijhawan
description: A porn star is hired by a dashing intelligence officer as a 'honey-trap' for a dreaded assassin. She not only has to confront her bitter-sweet past, but is also forced to make an impossible choice - one that will put her own life in jeopardy.

title: Teri Meri Kahaani
cast: Shahid Kapoor, Priyanka Chopra Jonas, Omar Khan, Prachi Desai, Neha Sharma
description: A couple lives though three different lives over different eras as destiny conspires to make them fall in love with each other, against all odds.

title: Aashiqui 2
cast: Aditya Roy Kapur, Shraddha Kapoor, Shaad Randhawa, Mahesh Thakur, Salil Acharya
description: A young woman meets a failing musician who launches her singing career, but their relationship is doomed when people assume he's with her for her fame and fortune.

title: Walking with Dinosaurs
cast: Justin Long, John Leguizamo, Tiya Sircar, Skyler Stone, Clay Savage
country: Australia, India, United Kingdom, United States of America
description: In a time when dinosaurs rule the Earth, the smallest dinosaur of the herd, a playful Pachyrhinosaurus named Patchi, embarks on the biggest adventure of his life. As he tries to find his place in a spectacular world filled with fun-loving friends and a few dangerous foes, Patchi will discover the courage he needs to become the leader of the herd and a hero for the ages.

title: Dhoom 3
cast: Aamir Khan, Abhishek Bachchan, Katrina Kaif, Uday Chopra, Jackie Shroff
description: To avenge his father's death, a circus entertainer trained in magic and acrobatics robs banks to take down a corrupt bank owner. Two cops from Mumbai are assigned to the case.

title: Paranoia
cast: Liam Hemsworth, Harrison Ford, Gary Oldman, Amber Heard, Josh Holloway
description: An entry-level employee at a powerful corporation finds himself occupying a corner office, but at a dangerous price—he must spy on his boss's old mentor to secure for him a multi-billion dollar advantage.

title: Delivery Man
cast: Vince Vaughn, Cobie Smulders, Chris Pratt, Britt Robertson, Jack Reynor
description: An affable underachiever finds out he's fathered 533 children through anonymous donations to a fertility clinic 20 years ago. Now he must decide whether or not to come forward when 142 of them file a lawsuit to reveal his identity.

title: The Fifth Estate
cast: Benedict Cumberbatch, Daniel Brühl, Anthony Mackie, David Thewlis, Alicia Vikander
description: A look at the relationship between WikiLeaks founder Julian Assange and his early supporter and eventual colleague Daniel Domscheit-Berg, and how the website's growth and influence led to an irreparable rift between the two friends.

title: The Reluctant Fundamentalist
cast: Riz Ahmed, Kate Hudson, Liev Schreiber, Kiefer Sutherland, Om Puri
country: Qatar, United States of America, India
description: In New York, a Pakistani native finds that his American Dream has collapsed in the wake of the 9/11 terrorist attacks.

title: Yeh Jawaani Hai Deewani
cast: Ranbir Kapoor, Deepika Padukone, Aditya Roy Kapur, Kalki Koechlin, Kunaal Roy Kapur
description: On a trekking trip, an introverted Naina falls for a charming ex-classmate, whose thirst for adventure drives them apart. Years later, their paths cross again.

title: Krrish 3
cast: Hrithik Roshan, Priyanka Chopra Jonas, Vivek Oberoi, Kangana Ranaut, Arif Zakaria
description: Krrish and his father must team up to save the world from a psychokinetic evil man named Kaal and his army of mutants.

title: Chennai Express
cast: Shah Rukh Khan, Deepika Padukone, Nikitin Dheer, Manorama, Sathyaraj
description: Rahul embarks on a journey to a small town in Tamil Nadu to fulfill the last wish of his grandfather: to have his ashes immersed in the Holy water of Rameshwaram. En route, he meets a woman hailing from a unique family down South. As they find love through this journey in the exuberant lands of South India, an unanticipated drive awaits them.

title: The Lunchbox
cast: Irrfan Khan, Nimrat Kaur, Nawazuddin Siddiqui, Lillete Dubey, Nasirr Khan
country: France, Germany, India, United States of America
description: A mistaken delivery in Mumbai's famously efficient lunchbox delivery system (Mumbai's Dabbawallahs) connects a young housewife to a stranger in the dusk of his life. They build a fantasy world together through notes in the lunchbox. Gradually, this fantasy threatens to overwhelm their reality.

title: Drishyam
cast: Mohanlal, Meena, Asha Sarath, Kalabhavan Shajon, Ansiba Hassan
description: Georgekutty lives a happy life with his wife and daughters. Things take a turn when his daughter gets indecently filmed using a hidden camera, by the son of a police inspector.

title: Goliyon Ki Raasleela Ram-Leela
cast: Ranveer Singh, Deepika Padukone, Richa Chadha, Supriya Pathak, Sharad Kelkar
description: Ran and Leela are passionately in love with each other. The only problem is that their respective clans have been enemies for 500 years.

title: Saving Santa
cast: Martin Freeman, Tim Curry, Tim Conway, Pam Ferris, Ashley Tisdale
country: India, United Kingdom, United States of America
description: A lowly stable elf finds that he is the only one who can stop an invasion of the North Pole by using the secret of Santa's Sleigh, a TimeGlobe, to travel back in time to Save Santa - twice.

title: Welcome to the Punch
cast: James McAvoy, Mark Strong, David Morrissey, Peter Mullan, Daniel Mays
country: Canada, India, United Kingdom, United States of America
description: When notorious criminal Jacob Sternwood is forced to return to London, it gives detective Max Lewinsky one last chance to take down the man he's always been after.

title: Bhaag Milkha Bhaag
cast: Farhan Akhtar, Sonam Kapoor Ahuja, Divya Dutta, Pavan Malhotra, Rebecca Breeds
description: The true story of the "Flying Sikh" world champion runner and Olympian Milkha Singh who overcame the massacre of his family, civil war during the India-Pakistan partition, and homelessness to become one of India's most iconic athletes.

title: Main Krishna Hoon
cast: Paresh Ganatra, Juhi Chawla Mehta, Namit Shah, Hrithik Roshan, Katrina Kaif
description: In answer to an orphan boy's prayers, the divine Lord Krishna comes to Earth, befriends the boy, and helps him find a loving family.

title: Vishwaroopam
cast: Kamal Haasan, Rahul Bose, Andrea Jeremiah, Pooja Kumar, Shekhar Kapur
description: Vishwanathan, a Kathak dance teacher in New York, is happy in his marriage with Nirupama, a nuclear oncologist who married him to pursue higher studies in the USA. Deciding to cut ties with her husband, Nirupama hires a private detective to monitor his activities. To her utter shock, certain truths about her husband are subsequently revealed, setting off a chain of events that will change both of their lives irreversibly.

title: Special 26
cast: Akshay Kumar, Anupam Kher, Manoj Bajpayee, Jimmy Shergill, Divya Dutta
description: In the early 1980s in India, a group of con artists rob businessmen and politicians by posing as officers of the CBI or Income Tax Department. The gang stages fake raids during which they steal great amounts of money from their targets while a relentless cop is on their trail.

title: Madras Cafe
cast: John Abraham, Nargis Fakhri, Raashii Khanna, Siddhartha Basu, Prakash Belawadi
description: An Indian intelligence agent journeys to a war-torn coastal island to break a resolute rebel group and meets a passionate journalist.

title: Neelakasham Pachakadal Chuvanna Bhoomi
cast: Dulquer Salmaan, Sunny Wayne, Bala Hijam, Ena Saha, Dhritiman Chatterjee
description: Kasi and Suni are close friends who studied together in an engineering college. Assi, who comes to Kerala to study engineering under the North East quota falls in love with Kasi. Certain incidents that follow set Kasi and Suni on a road trip to Nagaland on two motorcycles. The incidents that happen during this road adventure forms the film.

title: Seethamma Vakitlo Sirimalle Chettu
cast: Venkatesh, Mahesh Babu, Prakash Raj, Anjali, Samantha Ruth Prabhu
description: Seethamma Vakitlo Sirimalle Chettu revolves around a lovable family headed by Relangi . He has two sons- Vijay "Peddodu" and Ajay "Chinnodu". The unemployment of his children and the ridicule heaped on the family by relatives puts some strain on the relationships. What does he do in these circumstances is the rest of the story.

title: Zindagi 50 50
cast: Veena Malik, Riya Sen, Rajan Verma, Arya Babbar, Supriya Kumari
description: Zindagi 50 50 has three stories of common people's special dreams. And to fulfill those dreams they have to struggle hard. Sometimes few get it easily, where most of them must struggle very hard with lots of sacrifice, values, principals to achieve their dreams. Among them only few get it after long struggle time where most of them have to loose everything with a failure tag.

title: ABCD
cast: Prabhu Deva, Ganesh Acharya, Kay Kay Menon, Lauren Gottlieb, Dharmesh Yelande
description: When a capable dancer is provoked by the evil design of his employer, naturally he will be out to prove his mettle.

title: Raanjhanaa
cast: Dhanush, Sonam Kapoor Ahuja, Abhay Deol, Swara Bhasker, Mohammed Zeeshan Ayyub
description: A small-town boy needs to break through the class divide to gain acceptance from his childhood sweetheart who is in love with big city ideals.

title: R... Rajkumar
cast: Shahid Kapoor, Sonakshi Sinha, Mukul Dev, Ashish Vidhyarthi, Sonu Sood
description: Rajkumar, an aimless youth, works for a drug baron and is sent to kill a rival dealer. His life is changed forever when he meets Chanda, and has no idea she is the adopted daughter of the man he is supposed to kill.

title: Jolly LLB
cast: Arshad Warsi, Boman Irani, Saurabh Shukla, Amrita Rao, Harsh Chhaya
description: Wanting to earn fame and fortune, a small time lawyer files a PIL for an infamous hit-and-run, and thus learns what it really is like to be a lawyer.

title: Race 2
director: Abbas Alibhai Burmawalla, Mustan Alibhai Burmawalla
cast: Saif Ali Khan, John Abraham, Deepika Padukone, Anil Kapoor, Ameesha Patel
description: Ranveer Singh (Saif Ali Khan) travels to exotic locales and confronts the Turkish mafia on a mission to avenge the death of his lover Sonia in this action-packed sequel. In the process of seeking her killers, Ranveer crosses Armaan Mallick (John Abraham) and Aleena (Deepika Padukone) -- two of the most feared figures in the Turkish underworld. Meanwhile, Ranveer's loyal friend RD (Anil Kapoor) and his new partner Cherry (Amisha Patel) offer a helping hand in a world where love is cheap and trust is a luxury most agents can't afford.

title: Ugly
cast: Ronit Roy, Rahul Bhat, Vineet Kumar Singh, Tejaswini Kolhapure, Girish Kulkarni
description: A team of the best cops in Mumbai is dispatched to find a girl who has gone missing from her father's car. As the hunt for the kidnapper begins, fingers suspiciously point to closer home.

title: Singam 2
cast: Suriya, Anushka Shetty, Hansika Motwani, Vivek, Santhanam
description: Picking up the storyline from where Singam ended, Duraisingam has gone undercover after meeting the Home Minister and is working as an NCC officer in a school in Thoothukudi. The only people who know about this operation are the Chief Minister and Home Minister apart from himself.

title: Shahid
cast: Rajkummar Rao, Kay Kay Menon, Tigmanshu Dhulia, Mohammed Zeeshan Ayyub, Vipin Sharma
description: A story based on real-life human-rights and criminal lawyer, Shahid Azmi, who was slain while defending the wrongly accused by the law in terrorist activities.

title: Go Goa Gone
cast: Kunal Khemu, Anand Tiwari, Vir Das, Saif Ali Khan, Puja Gupta
description: A rave party off the coast of Goa goes horrifyingly and hilariously wrong when the island is overrun with zombies.

title: Kai Po Che!
cast: Sushant Singh Rajput, Rajkummar Rao, Amit Sadh, Amrita Puri, Asif Basra
description: Three friends growing up in India at the turn of the millennium set out to open a training academy to produce the country's next cricket stars.

title: Boss
cast: Akshay Kumar, Shiv Panditt, Mithun Chakraborty, Ronit Roy, Aditi Rao Hydari
description: Disowned by his father as a boy, Surya is taken in by a crime boss. When his brother Shiv is wrongly imprisoned, his father pleads for Surya's help.

title: Commando - A One Man Army
cast: Vidyut Jammwal, Pooja Chopra, Jaideep Ahlawat, Jagat Rawat, Ishita Vyas
description: A disavowed Indian commando helps protect a woman from a local thug who is hellbent on forcing her to marry him.

title: Satyagraha
cast: Amitabh Bachchan, Ajay Devgn, Kareena Kapoor Khan, Arjun Rampal, Amrita Rao
description: Satyagraha is the story of a son who yearns for a father. Of a father, who grieves for his lost son. Of a young woman who fights so hard with life that she has forgotten to love. Of an ambitious rabble-rouser, for whom action is the knee-jerk mantra. It is the story of how these four discover one another, and come together to raise hell, shaking the powers that be to their very roots! But, Satyagraha is also the story of an influential power-hungry despot who will stop at nothing to destroy them.

title: Need for Speed
cast: Aaron Paul, Dominic Cooper, Imogen Poots, Kid Cudi, Rami Malek
description: The film revolves around a local street-racer who partners with a rich and arrogant business associate, only to find himself framed by his colleague and sent to prison. After he gets out, he joins a New York-to-Los Angeles race to get revenge. But when the ex-partner learns of the scheme, he puts a massive bounty on the racer's head, forcing him to run a cross-country gauntlet of illegal racers in all manner of supercharged vehicles.

title: The Hundred-Foot Journey
cast: Helen Mirren, Manish Dayal, Om Puri, Charlotte Le Bon, Rohan Chand
country: India, United States of America, United Arab Emirates
description: A story centered around an Indian family who moves to France and opens a restaurant across the street from a Michelin-starred French restaurant.

title: Kick
cast: Salman Khan, Jacqueline Fernandez, Randeep Hooda, Nawazuddin Siddiqui, Mithun Chakraborty
description: An adrenaline junkie walks away from a whirlwind romance and embraces a new life as a thief, though he soon finds himself pursued by veteran police officer and engaged in a turf war with a local gangster.

title: PK
cast: Aamir Khan, Anushka Sharma, Saurabh Shukla, Boman Irani, Sushant Singh Rajput
description: A stranger in the city asks questions no one has asked before. Known only by his initials, the man's innocent questions and childlike curiosity take him on a journey of love, laughter and letting go.

title: The Good Lie
cast: Reese Witherspoon, Corey Stoll, Thad Luckinbill, Sarah Baker, Maria Howell
country: India, Kenya, United States of America
description: A young refugee of the Sudanese Civil War who wins a lottery for relocation to the United States with three other lost boys. Encountering the modern world for the first time, they develop an unlikely friendship with a brash American woman assigned to help them, but the young man struggles to adjust to this new life and his feelings of guilt about the brother he left behind.

title: Haider
cast: Shahid Kapoor, Tabu, Kay Kay Menon, Shraddha Kapoor, Narendra Jha
description: A young man returns to Kashmir after his father's disappearance to confront his uncle - the man he suspects to have a role in his father's fate.

title: Kaththi
cast: Vijay, Samantha Ruth Prabhu, Sathish, Neil Nitin Mukesh, Tota Roy Chowdhury
description: Kathiresan aka Kaththi, a criminal, escapes from the Kolkata prison and comes to Chennai, where he comes across his doppelganger Jeevanandham, fighting for his life after being shot at by unknown men. Kathir decides to pass off as Jeeva and make away with a lump sum amount but once he realizes who Jeeva really is, Kathir turns a crusader.

title: Main Tera Hero
cast: Varun Dhawan, Ileana D'Cruz, Nargis Fakhri, Anupam Kher, Rajpal Yadav
description: Seenu loves Sunaina but they're chased by a stalking cop, an infatuated beauty and her mafia don dad - can Seenu's heroics work?

title: Happy New Year
cast: Shah Rukh Khan, Deepika Padukone, Abhishek Bachchan, Boman Irani, Sonu Sood
description: Six would-be thieves enter a prestigious dance competition as a cover for their larger goal of pulling off a major heist.

title: Hasee Toh Phasee
cast: Sidharth Malhotra, Parineeti Chopra, Adah Sharma, Manoj Joshi, Sharat Saxena
description: On the eve of Nikhil and Karishma’s engagement, Karishma’s wealthy father, Devesh Solanki, expresses his disapproval, believing Nikhil to be a lackadaisical young man. With one week to prove himself worthy to marry Karishma, Nikhil and Karishma's sister, Meeta, grow closer to each other.

title: Bang Bang!
cast: Hrithik Roshan, Katrina Kaif, Danny Denzongpa, Javed Jaffrey, Jimmy Shergill
description: A young bank receptionist gets mixed up with Rajveer Nanda, a man who has a mysterious background.

title: Jai Ho
cast: Salman Khan, Tabu, Danny Denzongpa, Daisy Shah, Mahesh Manjrekar
description: An upright ex-army man, Jai fights a solitary war against corruption and injustice. With a simple mantra to pay forward, he starts off by helping one person and forms an ever growing circle of people helping each other.

title: Coming Home
cast: Gong Li, Chen Daoming, Zhang Huiwen, Guo Tao, Liu Peiqi
country: China, France, Hong Kong, India, United States of America
description: Lu and Feng are a devoted couple forced to separate when Lu is arrested and sent to a labor camp as a political prisoner during the Cultural Revolution. He finally returns home only to find that his beloved wife no longer remembers him.

title: Legends of Oz: Dorothy's Return
cast: Lea Michele, Dan Aykroyd, Jim Belushi, Kelsey Grammer, Tacey Adams
description: Dorothy wakes up in post-tornado Kansas, only to be whisked back to Oz to try to save her old friends the Scarecrow, the Lion, the Tin Man and Glinda from a devious new villain, the Jester. Wiser the owl, Marshal Mallow, China Princess and Tugg the tugboat join Dorothy on her latest magical journey through the colorful landscape of Oz to restore order and happiness to Emerald City.

title: Singham Returns
cast: Ajay Devgn, Kareena Kapoor Khan, Amole Gupte, Anupam Kher, Vineet Sharma
description: Owing to the wrongdoings affiliated with evils similar to black money, an honest but ferocious police officer returns as the Deputy Commissioner of Police with the prospect of wiping out injustice.

title: Mardaani
cast: Rani Mukerji, Tahir Raj Bhasin, Jisshu Sengupta, Sanjay Taneja, Mona Ambegaonkar
description: A Mumbai police officer's search for a missing teenage girl leads her to the depraved world of child trafficking. What follows is a cat-and-mouse game between the officer and a ruthless mafia kingpin.

title: 2 States
cast: Alia Bhatt, Arjun Kapoor, Amrita Singh, Revathi, Ronit Roy
description: A man and a woman come from two very different cultural backgrounds, and decide that they won't get married until they convince their parents. As feared, differences between the families pose a hurdle.

title: The Swan Princess: A Royal Family Tale
cast: Laura Bailey, Yuri Lowenthal, Joseph Medrano, James Arrington, Darrel Guilbeau
country: India, South Korea, United States of America
description: Shortly after the Royal Family adopts a young girl named Alise, she is taken away into the forest. Princess Odette, Derek and their woodland friends, must work together to find a way to bring her home to the castle.

title: Bangalore Days
cast: Nazriya Nazim Fahadh, Nivin Pauly, Dulquer Salmaan, Fahadh Faasil, Parvathy Thiruvothu
description: A fun roller coaster ride about three young people, Aju, Divya and Kuttan who are cousins, reach Bangalore to dream, discover & explore!

title: Gunday
cast: Ranveer Singh, Arjun Kapoor, Priyanka Chopra Jonas, Irrfan Khan, Saurabh Shukla
description: The lives of Calcutta's most powerful gangsters - Bikram and Bala, changes when Nandita enters it. Then a counter-force takes charge and a thriller unfolds.

title: The Longest Week
cast: Jason Bateman, Olivia Wilde, Billy Crudup, Jenny Slate, Tony Roberts
description: Left broke and homeless by his wealthy parents' divorce, a young man moves in with an old friend and finally meets the woman of his dreams -- only to discover she's already dating his friend.

title: Highway
cast: Alia Bhatt, Randeep Hooda, Durgesh Kumar, Pradeep Nagar, Saharsh Kumar Shukla
description: Right before her wedding, a young woman finds herself abducted and held for ransom. As the initial days pass, she begins to develop a strange bond with her kidnapper.

title: Heropanti

description: A budding director endeavors to research a merciless gangster for making a film on gangsterism. But his secret attempts to conduct the research fail when he gets caught for snooping.

country: China, France, India, United States of America

Donovan boards a plane to Berlin, hoping to win the young man's freedom through a prisoner exchange. If all goes well, the Russians would get Rudolf Abel, the convicted spy who Donovan defended in court.

country: India, United Kingdom, United States of America

Adventure awaits as he meets new friend James Hook and the warrior Tiger Lily. They must band together to save Neverland from the ruthless pirate Blackbeard. Along the way, the rebellious and mischievous boy discovers his true destiny, becoming the hero forever known as Peter Pan.

title: Gabbar Is Back
cast: Akshay Kumar, Shruti Haasan, Suman Talwar, Jaideep Ahlawat, Sunil Grover

title: Premam

After that incident these two lovers lives separate until their siblings fallen in love. With this new love story their paths intertwines again.

description: Meeting while on vacation, Ved and Tara sense a connection but vow to keep their real identities a secret. Years later, their paths cross again.

country: Canada, India, United Kingdom, United States of America

What ensues is a great comedy of errors, as one hilarious situation after another unfolds. Raftaar falls head over heels for this exotic, mysterious girl. The romance takes a deadly turn when he realizes that Sara is not who he thinks she is and has an agenda, which takes him to Romania. description: A corrupt cop and a serial killer obsessed with a psychopath from the '60s get caught up in a ruthless cat-and-mouse game.

After a shipwreck leaves the brave crew stranded on a wild, mysterious island, they meet Lucas, a young boy who has been living in seclusion. Now the faithful friends must work together to escape the island and the ferociously hungry creatures that dwell there.

title: Dhuruvangal Pathinaaru

title: Fitoor

title: A Dog's Purpose

country: Canada, India, United States of America
description: A dog goes on quest to discover his purpose in life over the course of several lifetimes with multiple owners.
